title: Implement manager property create/edit endpoints and validation contract
description: Add backend endpoints for manager property create/edit with validation parity, role guardrails, and deterministic error payloads for native form consumption.
acceptance_criteria: API exposes manager-scoped create and edit property operations with documented request/response shapes
Validation errors use a stable envelope suitable for field-level form feedback
Feature tests cover success, validation failure, forbidden role, and session-invalid paths
